turns.content:
You are a subagent: gsd-planner. Create PLAN.md files for Phase 24.2 - Agent Profile Quality Enforcement.

## MANDATORY READS FIRST
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.planning/phases/24.2-agent-profile-quality-enforcement/24.2-RESEARCH.md
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.planning/phases/24.2-agent-profile-quality-enforcement/24.2-SPEC.md
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.planning/phases/24.1-agent-hierarchy-restructure/24-CONTEXT.md

Also read 3 agent files for format reference:
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.hivefiver-meta-builder/agents-lab/active/refactoring/hm-executor.md
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.hivefiver-meta-builder/agents-lab/active/refactoring/hm-code-reviewer.md
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.hivefiver-meta-builder/agents-lab/active/refactoring/hm-verifier.md

## Phase Goal
Upgrade all 30 hm-* agent profile bodies from draft stubs to production-grade expert instructions. Frontmatter is already correct (mode: all, hidden: true). Now fill in the BODY content.

## CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS
1. Do NOT modify frontmatter — it's already correct (description, mode: all, hidden: true)
2. Do NOT add tools/permission/temperature/steps/color fields
3. Do NOT add looping/gating/hierarchy logic — these belong in programmatic features
4. Each agent = one domain, non-overlapping
5. Each agent body must include:
   - Role description (what, why expertise)
   - Artifact contract (what files, naming, format)
   - Execution flow (steps with deviation rules)
   - Analysis paralysis guard (5+ reads without write = blocked)
   - Success criteria checklist
   - Delegation boundary (when to signal orchestrator)

## Plans

### Plan 1: 24.2-01-PLAN.md — Upgrade 8 Execution/Implementation Agents
hm-executor, hm-verifier, hm-planner, hm-plan-checker, hm-code-reviewer, hm-code-fixer, hm-integration-checker, hm-debug-session-manager

### Plan 2: 24.2-02-PLAN.md — Upgrade 8 Research/Planning Agents
hm-project-researcher, hm-phase-researcher, hm-synthesizer, hm-codebase-mapper, hm-pattern-mapper, hm-architect, hm-roadmapper, hm-specifier

### Plan 3: 24.2-03-PLAN.md — Upgrade 8 Cross-Cutting/Support Agents
hm-intent-loop, hm-ecologist, hm-shipper, hm-nyquist-auditor, hm-intel-updater, hm-security-auditor, hm-debugger, hm-user-profiler

### Plan 4: 24.2-04-PLAN.md — Upgrade 6 UI/Documentation Agents
hm-ui-researcher, hm-ui-checker, hm-ui-auditor, hm-doc-writer, hm-doc-verifier, hm-orchestrator

### Plan 5: 24.2-05-PLAN.md — Create Artifact Schema Reference
Create: .planning/references/artifact-schema.md
Document naming conventions, YAML frontmatter fields, lifecycle rules for all artifact types

## Agent Body Format (template)

```markdown
## Role
[What this agent does, why it has this expertise]

## Artifact Contract
- **Produces:** {file path and naming convention}
- **Format:** {YAML frontmatter fields, required sections}
- **Location:** {.planning/ or .hivemind/ or project root}

## Execution Flow
1. Read required context files
2. Execute task with deviation rules
3. Create artifact with correct naming
4. Self-check (verify claims before reporting)
5. Return structured completion

### Deviation Rules
- Auto-fix bugs/inconsistencies found during execution
- Auto-add missing critical functionality for correctness/security
- Ask orchestrator about architectural changes
- Max 3 fix attempts per task

### Analysis Paralysis Guard
If 5+ consecutive Read/Grep/Glob calls without any Edit/Write/Bash action: STOP. State why no action taken. Either write code or report blocked.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] Execution flow complete
- [ ] Artifact created with correct naming/format
- [ ] Deviation rules applied if needed
- [ ] Self-check passed

## Delegation Boundary
If task falls outside my domain (e.g., executor detects need for debug), signal orchestrator with: "Task requires {specialist} agent. Reason: {explanation}. Suggested next: dispatch {agent-name}."
```

Write PLAN.md files to: /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.planning/phases/24.2-agent-profile-quality-enforcement/
I am **subagent: gsd-planner**, role: Phase plan creator. I must create PLAN.md files for Phase 24.2 - Agent Profile Quality Enforcement. Let me start by reading the mandatory context files.
Now let me read the 3 agent format reference files.
Let me check the existing phase directory and ROADMAP for context.
Let me check which agent files already exist.
Good, all 30 hm-* agent files exist. Let me quickly verify a few more have the same stub format.
Let me check a couple more agent stubs to understand variety.
Now I have full context. Let me write all 5 PLAN.md files. All plans are independent (no file overlap) so all run in Wave 1.
All 5 PLAN.md files created. Let me validate them and update the ROADMAP.
Now let me update the ROADMAP.md Phase 24.2 section with plan information.

## PLANNING COMPLETE

**Phase:** 24.2-agent-profile-quality-enforcement
**Plans:** 5 plan(s) in 1 wave(s)

### Wave Structure

| Wave | Plans | Autonomous |
|------|-------|------------|
| 1 | 24.2-01, 24.2-02, 24.2-03, 24.2-04, 24.2-05 | yes, yes, yes, yes, yes |

All 5 plans are independent (zero file overlap) — they edit separate agent files or create a new reference document. All execute in Wave 1.

### Plans Created

| Plan | Objective | Tasks | Files |
|------|-----------|-------|-------|
| **24.2-01** | Upgrade 8 Execution/Implementation Agents | 8 | hm-executor, hm-verifier, hm-planner, hm-plan-checker, hm-code-reviewer, hm-code-fixer, hm-integration-checker, hm-debug-session-manager |
| **24.2-02** | Upgrade 8 Research/Planning Agents | 8 | hm-project-researcher, hm-phase-researcher, hm-synthesizer, hm-codebase-mapper, hm-pattern-mapper, hm-architect, hm-roadmapper, hm-specifier |
| **24.2-03** | Upgrade 8 Cross-Cutting/Support Agents | 8 | hm-intent-loop, hm-ecologist, hm-shipper, hm-nyquist-auditor, hm-intel-updater, hm-security-auditor, hm-debugger, hm-user-profiler |
| **24.2-04** | Upgrade 6 UI/Documentation/Orchestration Agents | 6 | hm-ui-researcher, hm-ui-checker, hm-ui-auditor, hm-doc-writer, hm-doc-verifier, hm-orchestrator |
| **24.2-05** | Create Canonical Artifact Schema Reference | 1 | `.planning/references/artifact-schema.md` |

### Requirements Coverage

| Req | Description | Coverage |
|-----|-------------|----------|
| Q-01 | Execution flow sections | Plans 01-04 (all 30 agents) |
| Q-02 | Artifact output specifications | Plans 01-04 (all 30 agents) |
| Q-03 | Success criteria checklists | Plans 01-04 (all 30 agents) |
| Q-04 | No looping/gating/hierarchy logic | Plans 01-04 (all agents — enforced in templates) |
| Q-05 | No tool/permission references | Plans 01-04 (all agents — enforced in templates) |
| Q-06 | Delegation/boundary rules | Plans 01-04 (all 30 agents) |
| Q-07 | GSD patterns adopted | Plans 01-04 (artifact naming, execution flow patterns) |
| Q-08 | Artifact schema reference | Plan 05 |

### Key Design Decisions

1. **Agent profile template** uses `##` markdown sections (not GSD's XML tags) — 6 sections per agent: Role, Artifact Contract, Execution Flow (with Deviation Rules + Analysis Paralysis Guard subsections), Success Criteria, Delegation Boundary
2. **All 30 agents get the same structural template** with domain-specific content — ensures consistency while allowing specialization
3. **hm-orchestrator** gets extra emphasis on delegation-only (no implementation) — its profile explicitly forbids executing tasks directly
4. **No frontmatter changes** — description/mode/hidden already correct per D-24-02
5. **Analysis paralysis guard** varies by agent role (execution agents: 5 reads; research agents: 6-8 reads; orchestrator: 3 dispatches)

### Next Steps

Execute: `/gsd-execute-phase 24.2`

<sub>`/clear` first — fresh context window</sub>
